jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - NHB - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
NHB, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
